questions.question: Explain the difference between a Turing Machine and a Finite State Machine (FSM) in terms of their computational capabilities.
questions.hint: Focus on the limitations of each model

questions.question: What is the halting problem, and why is it undecidable?
questions.hint: Refer to Section 5.1 of the textbook for details

questions.hint: Focus on the syntax and structure of regular expressions
